name: Jira Story Triage
description: Audit a Jira backlog, sprint, or JQL-scoped set of stories for agent-readiness: score each story against the five-question actionability bar (self-contained change, reachable repo scope, binary ACs, no mid-flight decision, right-sized for one PR) and output a Tier A / B / C / Blocked table with complexity grouping (Quick / Standard / Involved) within the Tier A set. Read-only; composes the `jira` skill for all reads.

deps._runtime_contract: Sibling skills are addressed BY NAME at runtime. The agent's harness resolves the name to whatever install location the user picked. `source` below is install guidance only — never a runtime path.

skills.name: jira
skills.purpose: All Jira reads: check, search (for the JQL scope), get-issue (for image-content confirmation). This skill never makes a raw Jira REST call and never invokes a write verb. Hard dependency — there is no degraded path without it.

input.arguments: A JQL expression, a sprint/board scope, or a project key (defaults to open sprints). Optionally a repo URL or name for grounding.

artifacts: A Markdown triage table with Tier A / B / C / Blocked rows, complexity grouping within Tier A (Quick / Standard / Involved), and an invocation-repo header. Displayed in the agent session; not written to disk unless the user requests --output.
